message:
feat(vef): add Verifiable Execution Framework with constraint compiler, receipt chains, and proof scheduler

Introduces the complete VEF (Verifiable Execution Framework) subsystem for
deterministic execution verification across the FrankenNode runtime (Section 10.18).

VEF Constraint Compiler (vef/constraint_compiler.rs, ~47 KB):
- Policy constraint language parsing and validation
- Constraint compilation to executable verification predicates
- Schema-versioned constraint vectors for reproducible evaluation
- Integration with receipt verification pipeline

VEF Receipt Chain (vef/receipt_chain.rs, ~30 KB):
- Cryptographic receipt chain management for execution provenance
- Commitment log with append-only integrity guarantees
- Receipt schema vectors for deterministic chain validation
- Chain integrity verification with gap detection

VEF Proof Scheduler (vef/proof_scheduler.rs, ~25 KB):
- Proof generation scheduling with priority queuing
- Evidence collection orchestration across verification layers
- Integration with attestation pipeline for TEE-bound proofs

Connector Integration:
- vef_execution_receipt.rs: Receipt capture at execution boundaries
- vef_policy_constraints.rs: Policy constraint enforcement in connector layer
- Updated connector mod.rs with VEF module imports

Also adds conformance tests (vef_policy_constraint_compiler, vef_receipt_chain_integrity),
JSON spec files (v1 schemas), and verification vectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,86 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://franken-node.local/spec/vef_execution_receipt_v1.json",
+  "title": "VEF ExecutionReceipt",
+  "description": "Canonical deterministic receipt schema for VEF runtime actions.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": [
+    "schema_version",
+    "action_type",
+    "capability_context",
+    "actor_identity",
+    "artifact_identity",
+    "policy_snapshot_hash",
+    "timestamp_millis",
+    "sequence_number",
+    "witness_references",
+    "trace_id"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "schema_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "vef-execution-receipt-v1"
+    },
+    "action_type": {
+      "$ref": "#/$defs/ExecutionActionType"
+    },
+    "capability_context": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "minProperties": 1,
+      "propertyNames": {
+        "type": "string",
+        "minLength": 1
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": {
+        "type": "string",
+        "minLength": 1
+      }
+    },
+    "actor_identity": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "artifact_identity": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "policy_snapshot_hash": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+    },
+    "timestamp_millis": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0
+    },
+    "sequence_number": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0
+    },
+    "witness_references": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {
+        "type": "string",
+        "minLength": 1
+      },
+      "uniqueItems": true
+    },
+    "trace_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "$defs": {
+    "ExecutionActionType": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "network_access",
+        "filesystem_operation",
+        "process_spawn",
+        "secret_access",
+        "policy_transition",
+        "artifact_promotion"
+      ]
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,300 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://franken-node.local/spec/vef_policy_constraints_v1.json",
+  "title": "VEF Policy Constraint Compiler Envelope",
+  "description": "Schema for deterministic VEF policy-constraint compiler input/output contracts.",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": [
+    "schema_version",
+    "language_version",
+    "compiler_version",
+    "trace_id",
+    "policy_id",
+    "policy_snapshot_hash",
+    "predicates",
+    "coverage",
+    "rule_projections",
+    "events"
+  ],
+  "properties": {
+    "schema_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "vef-policy-constraints-v1"
+    },
+    "language_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "vef-policy-lang-v1"
+    },
+    "compiler_version": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "const": "vef-constraint-compiler-v1"
+    },
+    "trace_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "policy_id": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "minLength": 1
+    },
+    "policy_snapshot_hash": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$"
+    },
+    "predicates": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {
+        "$ref": "#/$defs/CompiledPredicate"
+      },
+      "minItems": 1
+    },
+    "coverage": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "minProperties": 1,
+      "propertyNames": {
+        "$ref": "#/$defs/ActionClassName"
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": {
+        "type": "integer",
+        "minimum": 0
+      }
+    },
+    "rule_projections": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {
+        "$ref": "#/$defs/RuleSemanticProjection"
+      },
+      "minItems": 1
+    },
+    "events": {
+      "type": "array",
+      "items": {
+        "$ref": "#/$defs/CompilerEvent"
+      },
+      "minItems": 1
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": false,
+  "$defs": {
+    "ActionClass": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "network_access",
+        "filesystem_operation",
+        "process_spawn",
+        "secret_access",
+        "policy_transition",
+        "artifact_promotion"
+      ]
+    },
+    "ActionClassName": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "network_access",
+        "filesystem_operation",
+        "process_spawn",
+        "secret_access",
+        "policy_transition",
+        "artifact_promotion"
+      ]
+    },
+    "RuleEffect": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "allow",
+        "deny",
+        "require"
+      ]
+    },
+    "PredicateKind": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "decision",
+        "capability",
+        "constraint"
+      ]
+    },
+    "CompiledPredicate": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "required": [
+        "predicate_id",
+        "source_rule_id",
+        "action_class",
+        "kind",
+        "expression",
+        "params",
+        "trace_link"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "predicate_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^pred-[0-9a-f]{16}$"
+        },
+        "source_rule_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "action_class": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/ActionClass"
+        },
+        "kind": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/PredicateKind"
+        },
+        "expression": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "params": {
+          "type": "object",
+          "additionalProperties": {
+            "type": "string"
+          }
+        },
+        "trace_link": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^policy:[^/]+/rule:[^/]+$"
+        }
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": false
+    },
+    "RuleSemanticProjection": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "required": [
+        "rule_id",
+        "action_class",
+        "effect",
+        "required_capabilities",
+        "constraints"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "rule_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "action_class": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/ActionClass"
+        },
+        "effect": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/RuleEffect"
+        },
+        "required_capabilities": {
+          "type": "array",
+          "items": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          }
+        },
+        "constraints": {
+          "type": "object",
+          "propertyNames": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          },
+          "additionalProperties": {
+            "type": "string"
+          }
+        }
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": false
+    },
+    "CompilerEvent": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "required": [
+        "code",
+        "trace_id",
+        "message",
+        "rule_id"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "code": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "pattern": "^VEF-COMPILE-(001|002|ERR-001|ERR-002|ERR-003|ERR-004|ERR-005)$"
+        },
+        "trace_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "message": {
+          "type": "string"
+        },
+        "rule_id": {
+          "type": [
+            "string",
+            "null"
+          ]
+        }
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": false
+    },
+    "PolicyRule": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "required": [
+        "rule_id",
+        "action_class",
+        "effect",
+        "required_capabilities",
+        "constraints"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "rule_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "action_class": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/ActionClass"
+        },
+        "effect": {
+          "$ref": "#/$defs/RuleEffect"
+        },
+        "required_capabilities": {
+          "type": "array",
+          "items": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          }
+        },
+        "constraints": {
+          "type": "object",
+          "propertyNames": {
+            "type": "string",
+            "minLength": 1
+          },
+          "additionalProperties": {
+            "type": "string"
+          }
+        }
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": false
+    },
+    "RuntimePolicy": {
+      "type": "object",
+      "required": [
+        "schema_version",
+        "policy_id",
+        "require_full_action_coverage",
+        "rules"
+      ],
+      "properties": {
+        "schema_version": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "const": "vef-policy-lang-v1"
+        },
+        "policy_id": {
+          "type": "string",
+          "minLength": 1
+        },
+        "require_full_action_coverage": {
+          "type": "boolean"
+        },
+        "rules": {
+          "type": "array",
+          "items": {
+            "$ref": "#/$defs/PolicyRule"
+          },
+          "minItems": 1
+        }
+      },
+      "additionalProperties": false
+    }
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,104 @@
+{
+  "bead_id": "bd-16fq",
+  "fixture_id": "vef-policy-constraint-compiler-v1-golden",
+  "description": "Deterministic replay fixture for VEF policy-constraint compiler.",
+  "trace_id": "fixture-trace-001",
+  "input_policy": {
+    "schema_version": "vef-policy-lang-v1",
+    "policy_id": "fixture-policy-v1",
+    "require_full_action_coverage": true,
+    "rules": [
+      {
+        "rule_id": "network-egress-require",
+        "action_class": "network_access",
+        "effect": "require",
+        "required_capabilities": [
+          "net.egress"
+        ],
+        "constraints": {
+          "cidr_allowlist": "10.0.0.0/8",
+          "max_endpoints": "3"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "rule_id": "filesystem-prefix",
+        "action_class": "filesystem_operation",
+        "effect": "require",
+        "required_capabilities": [
+          "fs.read"
+        ],
+        "constraints": {
+          "allowed_prefix": "/srv/extensions"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "rule_id": "process-deny",
+        "action_class": "process_spawn",
+        "effect": "deny",
+        "required_capabilities": [],
+        "constraints": {
+          "reason": "no-subprocesses"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "rule_id": "secret-require",
+        "action_class": "secret_access",
+        "effect": "require",
+        "required_capabilities": [
+          "secret.fetch"
+        ],
+        "constraints": {
+          "max_ttl_seconds": "300"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "rule_id": "policy-transition-approval",
+        "action_class": "policy_transition",
+        "effect": "require",
+        "required_capabilities": [
+          "policy.approval"
+        ],
+        "constraints": {
+          "required_signatures": "2"
+        }
+      },
+      {
+        "rule_id": "artifact-promotion-verifier",
+        "action_class": "artifact_promotion",
+        "effect": "require",
+        "required_capabilities": [
+          "artifact.promote"
+        ],
+        "constraints": {
+          "min_verifier_quorum": "3"
+        }
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "expected_output": {
+    "schema_version": "vef-policy-constraints-v1",
+    "language_version": "vef-policy-lang-v1",
+    "compiler_version": "vef-constraint-compiler-v1",
+    "expected_rule_projection_count": 6,
+    "expected_min_predicates": 12,
+    "expected_coverage": {
+      "network_access": 1,
+      "filesystem_operation": 1,
+      "process_spawn": 1,
+      "secret_access": 1,
+      "policy_transition": 1,
+      "artifact_promotion": 1
+    },
+    "required_event_codes": [
+      "VEF-COMPILE-001",
+      "VEF-COMPILE-002"
+    ],
+    "required_invariants": [
+      "INV-VEF-COMP-DETERMINISTIC",
+      "INV-VEF-COMP-COVERAGE",
+      "INV-VEF-COMP-TRACEABLE",
+      "INV-VEF-COMP-VERSIONED",
+      "INV-VEF-COMP-ROUNDTRIP"
+    ]
+  }
+}
